turnResults.hostReply: I recorded that scene. Want to notice what shifts in your body when the volume rises?
turnResults.rationale: User reported a recurring interpersonal dynamic (going quiet when someone gets loud, with a different person). This is a relational scene recurrence. Store-first routing directs to circulatio_record_relational_scene. Because consent for projection_language is 'ask', the host stays scene-first and avoids projection or diagnostic claims. The reply acknowledges the share and offers a gentle somatic invitation without interpreting.
